successCriteria.capturedEvidence: T1-T4 evidence docs exist: task-1.md task-2.md task-3.md task-4.md; targeted pytest 24 passed; full backend pytest 59 passed; makemigrations check no changes detected | cleanup: closed workers 019ef77a-e1b2-7052-a0d1-3b4a2e5eb6b0 and 019ef781-8044-76a1-9cd6-6fe6ddddc23f; stopped curl QA django/mock LLM processes per wave1-api-curl-qa.txt

successCriteria.scenario: Wave 1 edge/adversarial path: analysis request missing company/posting returns 400; private profile/cover-letter data is not promoted to public company knowledge facts/chunks; user_private_candidate facts are rejected.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: curl missing company/posting returned HTTP/1.1 400 with company_id and job_posting keys; DB no-leak QA returned chunk_leak=False fact_leak=False; private candidate fact validation covered by companies/tests/test_company_knowledge.py | cleanup: no persistent DB QA runtime; curl QA django/mock LLM processes stopped per wave1-api-curl-qa.txt

successCriteria.scenario: Wave 1 regression path: existing legacy job_id analysis tests and company/job-posting tests still pass while new no-job contract is added compatibly.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Regression backend pytest passed: 59 passed in wave1-regression-pytest.txt; legacy job_id tests remained green while new no-Job contract was added compatibly | cleanup: no test server remained; netstat showed only TIME_WAIT for 18080/18081

before.codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/graphrag-company-kg-wave1/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/graphrag-company-kg-wave1/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
